scope: Research-only external form-understanding transfer baseline; not identity-document evaluation.
interpretation: This low external F1 is the baseline, not a failure to conceal. It reflects the small training split and validates that synthetic-only results do not estimate real-form generalization.
next_experiments: run the source-isolated CORD receipt experiment
analyze FUNSD error slices and improve only with validation-selected changes
do not transfer FUNSD labels into identity-field training
